mapper.update: INSERT INTO NIC70B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , DL_P_RNMCNO , CS_NO , DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD , DL_P_NM , DL_P_NTNLT_CD , DL_P_NTNLT_NM , RNM_PR_DL_SQ , RNM_PR_TL_DL_CNT , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , INDV_CORP_CCD , DL_OBJ_CD ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , RNMCNO , CS_NO , RNM_CNFR_CCD , CS_NM , NTN_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M004' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.NTN_CD)) , 0 , 0 , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , INDV_CORP_CCD , (SELECT DL_OBJ_CD FROM NIC10B T2 WHERE RNMCNO = T1.RNMCNO) FROM NIC01B T1 WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC70B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} ) )

UPDATE NIC78B T1 SET (DL_P_BRTDY , DL_P_SEX_CD , WP_NM , DTY_DPRT_NM , OCPTN_CCD , OCPTN_CCD_NM , CS_PSTN_CD , DL_P_PSPT_NO , IND_TYP_CD , IND_TYP_CD_NM , LG_AMT_ASTS_F ) = ( SELECT B.BRTDY , B.SEX_CD , B.WP_NM , B.DTY_DPRT_NM , A.STR_JOB_GUBN , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M059' AND CNTNT = A.STR_JOB_GUBN) AS DD1 , B.PSTN_CD , B.PSPT_NO , A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M008' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) , A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F
FROM NIC01B A, NIC02B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO )
, (DL_P_HSE_BSC_ADDR, DL_P_HSE_DNG_ADDR, DL_P_HSE_PST_NO) = ( SELECT BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR, PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' )
, (DL_P_WP_BSC_ADDR, DL_P_WP_DNG_ADDR, DL_P_WP_PST_NO) = ( SELECT BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR, PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' )
, (DL_P_HSE_NATI, DL_P_HSE_AREA, DL_P_HSE_ECNO, DL_P_HSE_NO) = ( SELECT CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' )
, (DL_P_WP_NATI, DL_P_WP_AREA, DL_P_WP_ECNO, DL_P_WP_NO) = ( SELECT CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' )
, (DL_P_MBL_NATI, DL_P_MBL_AREA, DL_P_MBL_ECNO, DL_P_MBL_NO) = ( SELECT CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '3' )
, (RPRST_P_RNM_NO, RPRST_P_NM) = ( SELECT '' RPRST_P_RNMCNO, RPRST_P_NM FROM NIC03B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO )
WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

INSERT INTO NIC79B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , DL_P_RNMCNO , CORP_RGST_NO , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , NPRFT_GROUP_F , IND_TYP_CD , IND_TYP_CD_NM , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO ) SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , RNMCNO , CORP_RGST_NO , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , NPRFT_GROUP_F , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M008' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC79B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO} )

UPDATE NIC79B T1 SET (RPRST_P_NM1, RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD1 , RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD1, RPRST_P_NTNLT_NM1 , RPRST_P_BRDY1) = ( SELECT RPRST_P_NM1, '' RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD , RPRST_P_NTNLT1, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M004' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(RPRST_P_NTNLT1)) , RPRST_P_BRDY1 FROM NIC03B T2 WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO )
, (HD_BRNCH_NATI, HD_BRNCH_AREA, HD_BRNCH_ECNO, HD_BRNCH_NO) = ( SELECT CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '1' )
, (HD_BRNCH_BSC_ADDR, HD_BRNCH_DNG_ADDR, HD_BRNCH_PST_NO) = ( SELECT BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR, PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '1' )
, (BSNS_CMPNY_NATI, BSNS_CMPNY_AREA, BSNS_CMPNY_ECNO, BSNS_CMPNY_NO) = ( SELECT CNTY_NATI_CRYP, CNTY_AREA_CRYP, CNTY_ECNO_CRYP, CNTY_NO_CRYP FROM NIC04B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.CNTC_TYP_CD = '2' )
, (BSNS_CMPNY_BSC_ADDR, BSNS_CMPNY_DNG_ADDR, BSNS_CMPNY_PST_NO) = ( SELECT BSC_ADDR, DNG_FLWG_ADDR, PST_NO FROM NIC05B T2 WHERE T2.RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND T2.ADDR_TYP_CD = '2' )
WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

UPDATE NIC79B T1 SET (ENTP_SCL_CCD, ENTP_SCL_CCD_NM, HMPG_ADDR, LSTNG_F, LSTNG_INFO) = ( SELECT CORP_CCD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M030' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(CORP_CCD)) , HMPG_ADDR , CASE WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS LSTNG_F, CASE WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL AND LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '0' || LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD || '||' || '1' || LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '0' || LSTNG_CLSF_DMSTC_CD WHEN (LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD IS NOT NULL) THEN '1' || LSTNG_CLSF_ABRD_CD END AS LSTNG_INFO FROM NIC14B T2 WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO ) WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND DL_P_RNMCNO = #{RNMCNO}

MERGE INTO NIC71B A USING ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , #{SSPS_DL_ID} AS SSPS_DL_ID , T2.GNL_AC_NO , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM , #{HNDL_P_ENO} AS HNDL_P_ENO , T2.AC_OPN_DT , T2.OPN_BRN_CD , T9.DPRT_NM AS AC_OPN_BRN_NM , T9.DPRT_POST_NO AS AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO , T2.MNGG_BRN_CD AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B T3 WHERE DPRT_CD = T2.MNGG_BRN_CD) AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM , T2.RNMCNO , (SELECT CS_NM FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO) AS CS_NM , T2.AC_RE_OBJ_CCD AS AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD , T2.ACNT_NO , T2.PRFT_BRN_CD , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = T2.PRFT_BRN_CD) AS PRFT_BRN_NM , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END FROM NIC18B T4 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}) AS AC_OPN_PRXY_F FROM NIC17B T2, NIC41B T9 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND T2.OPN_BRN_CD = T9.DPRT_CD(+) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) ) B ON ( A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , AC_OPN_DT , OPN_BRN_CD , AC_OPN_BRN_NM , AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO , MN_DL_DPRT_CD , MN_DL_DPRT_NM , RNMCNO , CS_NM , AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD , ACNT_NO , PRFT_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_NM , AC_OPN_PRXY_F ) VALUES ( B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , B.SSPS_DL_ID , B.GNL_AC_NO , B.HNDL_DY_TM , B.HNDL_P_ENO , B.AC_OPN_DT , B.OPN_BRN_CD , B.AC_OPN_BRN_NM , B.AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO , B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD , B.MN_DL_DPRT_NM , B.RNMCNO , B.CS_NM , B.AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD , B.ACNT_NO , B.PRFT_BRN_CD , B.PRFT_BRN_NM , B.AC_OPN_PRXY_F )

MERGE INTO NIC75B A USING ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , #{SSPS_DL_ID} AS SSPS_DL_ID , T1.GNL_AC_NO , T1.GDS_NO , T1.DL_DT , T1.DL_SQ , T1.DL_WY_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M046' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.DL_WY_CD)) AS DL_WY_NM , T1.DL_CHNNL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M044' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.DL_CHNNL_CD)) AS DL_CHNNL_NM , '' AS SMRY_TYP_CD , '' AS SMRY_TYP_NM , T1.DL_TM , NVL(T1.DL_AMT,0) AS DL_AMT , T1.CHCK_AMT , T1.CSH , T1.FCRNCY_DL_AMT , 0 AS USD_EXCH_AMT , T1.TFND_RA , T1.CRNCY_CD , T1.HANDLNG_BRN_CD , T2.DPRT_NM AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM , T2.DPRT_POST_NO AS HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , T1.DL_TYP_CD , '' AS FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , SYSDATE AS HNDL_DY_TM , T1.L_HNDL_P_ENO AS HNDL_P_ENO , T1.I_AMT_P_NM , T1.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , T1.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , T1.I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , T1.TRDG_CODE , T1.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T1.FUNS_SCRS_CODE , T1.TRTY_DTLS_CODE , T1.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , T1.PRDT_CLSN_CODE , T1.SERV_CLSN_CODE , T1.ISUS_PRDT_ID , T1.RLTV_ACNT_ID , T1.RNMCNO , T1.MNGG_BRN_CD , T1.PRFT_BRN_CD , T1.GDS_DIT_CD FROM NIC61B T1, NIC41B T2 WHERE T1.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND T1.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND T1.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND T1.HANDLNG_BRN_CD = T2.DPRT_CD(+) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} ) ) B ON ( A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_WY_CD , DL_WY_NM , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_CHNNL_NM , SMRY_TYP_CD , SMRY_TYP_NM , DL_TM , DL_AMT , CHCK_AMT , CSH , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , USD_EXCH_AMT , TFND_RA , CRNCY_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_NM , HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , DL_TYP_CD , FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , TRDG_CODE , DTLS_TRDG_NAME , FUNS_SCRS_CODE , TRTY_DTLS_CODE , ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , PRDT_CLSN_CODE , SERV_CLSN_CODE , ISUS_PRDT_ID , RLTV_ACNT_ID , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , GDS_DIT_CD ) VALUES ( B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , B.SSPS_DL_ID , B.GNL_AC_NO , B.GDS_NO , B.DL_DT , B.DL_SQ , B.DL_WY_CD , B.DL_WY_NM , B.DL_CHNNL_CD , B.DL_CHNNL_NM , B.SMRY_TYP_CD , B.SMRY_TYP_NM , B.DL_TM , B.DL_AMT , B.CHCK_AMT , B.CSH , B.FCRNCY_DL_AMT , B.USD_EXCH_AMT , B.TFND_RA , B.CRNCY_CD , B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD , B.HANDLNG_BRN_NM , B.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , B.DL_TYP_CD , B.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , B.HNDL_DY_TM , B.HNDL_P_ENO , B.I_AMT_P_NM , B.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , B.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , B.I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , B.TRDG_CODE , B.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , B.FUNS_SCRS_CODE , B.TRTY_DTLS_CODE , B.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , B.PRDT_CLSN_CODE , B.SERV_CLSN_CODE , B.ISUS_PRDT_ID , B.RLTV_ACNT_ID , B.RNMCNO , B.MNGG_BRN_CD , B.PRFT_BRN_CD , B.GDS_DIT_CD )

INSERT INTO NIC71B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , AC_OPN_DT , OPN_BRN_CD , AC_OPN_BRN_NM , AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO , MN_DL_DPRT_CD , MN_DL_DPRT_NM , RNMCNO , CS_NM , AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD , ACNT_NO , PRFT_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_NM , AC_OPN_PRXY_F ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , T2.GNL_AC_NO , SYSDATE , #{HNDL_P_ENO} , T2.AC_OPN_DT , T2.OPN_BRN_CD , T9.DPRT_NM , T9.DPRT_POST_NO , T2.MNGG_BRN_CD , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B T3 WHERE DPRT_CD = T2.MNGG_BRN_CD) , T2.RNMCNO , (SELECT CS_NM FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = T2.RNMCNO) , T2.AC_RE_OBJ_CCD , T2.ACNT_NO , T2.PRFT_BRN_CD , (SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = T2.PRFT_BRN_CD) , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END FROM NIC18B T4 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}) FROM NIC17B T2, NIC41B T9 WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND T2.OPN_BRN_CD = T9.DPRT_CD(+) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC71B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} ) )

INSERT INTO NIC75B (SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , GNL_AC_NO , GDS_NO , DL_DT , DL_SQ , DL_WY_CD , DL_WY_NM , DL_CHNNL_CD , DL_CHNNL_NM , SMRY_TYP_CD , SMRY_TYP_NM , DL_TM , DL_AMT , CHCK_AMT , CSH , FCRNCY_DL_AMT , USD_EXCH_AMT , TFND_RA , CRNCY_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_CD , HANDLNG_BRN_NM , HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO , DL_TYP_CD , FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , HNDL_DY_TM , HNDL_P_ENO , I_AMT_P_NM , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , TRDG_CODE , DTLS_TRDG_NAME , FUNS_SCRS_CODE , TRTY_DTLS_CODE , ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , PRDT_CLSN_CODE , SERV_CLSN_CODE , ISUS_PRDT_ID , RLTV_ACNT_ID , RNMCNO , MNGG_BRN_CD , PRFT_BRN_CD , GDS_DIT_CD ) ( SELECT #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} , #{SSPS_DL_ID} , T1.GNL_AC_NO , T1.GDS_NO , T1.DL_DT , T1.DL_SQ , T1.DL_WY_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M046' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.DL_WY_CD)) , T1.DL_CHNNL_CD , (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'M044' AND CNTNT = RTRIM(T1.DL_CHNNL_CD)) , '' AS SMRY_TYP_CD , '' AS SMRY_TYP_NM , T1.DL_TM , NVL(T1.DL_AMT,0) AS DL_AMT , T1.CHCK_AMT , T1.CSH , T1.FCRNCY_DL_AMT , 0 AS USD_EXCH_AMT , T1.TFND_RA , T1.CRNCY_CD , T1.HANDLNG_BRN_CD , T2.DPRT_NM , T2.DPRT_POST_NO , T1.DL_TYP_CD , '' AS FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD , SYSDATE , T1.L_HNDL_P_ENO , T1.I_AMT_P_NM , T1.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO , T1.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD , T1.I_AMT_P_TEL_NO , T1.TRDG_CODE , T1.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , T1.FUNS_SCRS_CODE , T1.TRTY_DTLS_CODE , T1.ACNT_TYPE_CLSN_CODE , T1.PRDT_CLSN_CODE , T1.SERV_CLSN_CODE , T1.ISUS_PRDT_ID , T1.RLTV_ACNT_ID , T1.RNMCNO , T1.MNGG_BRN_CD , T1.PRFT_BRN_CD , T1.GDS_DIT_CD FROM NIC61B T1, NIC41B T2 WHERE T1.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND T1.DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND T1.DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} AND T1.HANDLNG_BRN_CD = T2.DPRT_CD(+) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIC75B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND DL_DT = #{DL_DT} AND DL_SQ = #{DL_SQ} ) )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(A.RGSN_DATE) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(A.RGSN_DATE,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.RGSN_DATE,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.RGSN_DATE,7,2) END AS RGSN_DATE /* 등록일자 */ , CASE WHEN A.RGSN_CNCL_SECT_CODE = '1' THEN '등록' ELSE '해제' END AS RGSN_STAT /* 등록상태 */ , CASE WHEN A.OWCM_OTCP_SECT_CODE = '1' THEN '당사' ELSE '타사' END AS RGSN_GBN /* 등록구분 */ , NVL((SELECT M.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL M WHERE M.CMN_CODE_ID = '01035' AND M.CMN_CDVL = A.CNGR_SECT_CODE), ' ') AS CNGR_SECT_NAME /* 위탁자구분명 */ , NVL(F.ENTY_NAME, ' ') AS CS_NM /* 고객명 */ , G.CS_NO , NVL((SELECT M.CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL M WHERE M.CMN_CODE_ID = '00799' AND M.CMN_CDVL = A.TSUS_RJCT_RESN_CODE), ' ') AS TSUS_RJCT_RESN_NAME /* 수탁거부사유명 */ , CASE WHEN LENGTH(A.TSUS_RJCT_STRT_DATE) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_STRT_DATE,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_STRT_DATE,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_STRT_DATE,7,2) END AS TSUS_RJCT_STRT_DATE /* 수탁거부시작일자 */ , CASE WHEN LENGTH(A.TSUS_RJCT_END_DATE) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_END_DATE,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_END_DATE,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_END_DATE,7,2) END AS TSUS_RJCT_END_DATE /* 수탁거부종료일자 */ , CASE WHEN LENGTH(A.TSUS_RJCT_ACTN_DATE) = 8 THEN SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_ACTN_DATE,1,4)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_ACTN_DATE,5,2)||'-'||SUBSTR(A.TSUS_RJCT_ACTN_DATE,7,2) END AS TSUS_RJCT_ACTN_DATE /* 수탁거부조치일자 */ --------------------------------------- , A.CNGR_SECT_CODE /* 위탁자구분코드 */ , A.CLNT_ENTY_ID , A.TSUS_RJCT_RESN_CODE /* 수탁거부사유코드 */ FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_TSUS_RJCT_RGSN_CL A /* 수탁거부등록고객내역 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ENTY_NAME F ON A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = F.ENTY_ID AND F.LANG_CODE = 'KO' LEFT JOIN SSQ.NIC01B G ON A.CLNT_ENTY_ID = 0+G.RNMCNO WHERE G.CS_NO = #{CS_NO} ORDER BY A.RGSN_DATE DESC

SELECT GYLJ_LINE_G_C, count(*) AS CNT FROM AML_APPR A INNER JOIN TMS_APPL B ON A.APP_NO = B.LST_APP_NO INNER JOIN TMS_REQ C ON B.SCNR_ID = C.SCNR_ID WHERE A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C IN ('TMS1', 'TMS2') AND A.TARGET_ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_CD} AND A.SN_CCD != 'E' group by GYLJ_LINE_G_C

select e.inst_ccd , count(*) as CNT from NIC58B E, WF_PROC_INSTANCE a, WF_PROC_INSTANCE d, WF_WORK_PARTICIPANT b left outer join wf_work_performer c on ( c.WORK_STATUS_CD ='FINISHED' and b.work_id=c.work_id and b.PARTICIPANT_ID=c.PERFORMER_ID) where a.WORK_ID=b.WORK_ID and c.PERFORMER_ID is null and ((b.PERSON_YN='Y' AND b.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (b.PERSON_YN='N' AND b.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA, C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID}) ) ) and a.PAR_INST_ID=d.INST_ID and e.INST_ID=d.INST_ID and e.SN_PRGRS_CCD IN ('1','2') group by e.inst_ccd

SELECT (SELECT RPR_OGN_NM FROM NIC86B WHERE BRN_CD='122') AS ORG_NM --계좌개설 금융기관 , (SELECT TRNS_OGN_CD FROM NIC86B WHERE BRN_CD='122') AS ORG_C --개설금융기관코드, , A.ACNT_NO --계좌번호 , A.GNL_AC_NO --계좌ID , A.AC_OPN_DT --계좌개설일자 , A.OPN_BRN_CD --계좌개설점코드 , A.AC_OPN_BRN_NM -- 계좌개설점명 , A.MN_DL_DPRT_CD --계좌관리점코드 , A.MN_DL_DPRT_NM --계좌관리점명 , A.AC_TY_CD --계좌유형코드 , GET_CODE_NAME('M034',A.AC_TY_CD) AS AC_TY_NM--계좌유형 , A.CS_NM , A.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC FROM NIC71B A, NIC70B B, NIC66B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND A.RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT=#{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID =#{SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.CS_NM, --고객명 A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, --실명번호구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --실명번호구분코드명 A.CS_NO, A.CS_NO AS CS_NO_DEC, --실명번호 A.RNMCNO, -- 고객번호 A.NTN_CD, --국가코드 A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD, --직업코드 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --계좌개설금융기관 C.ACNT_NO, C.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, C.GNL_AC_NO, --계좌번호 --GET_CODE_NAME('M034',C.AC_TY_CD) AS GOODS , --계좌유형 GET_CODE_NAME('M034', '99') AS GOODS, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.OPN_BRN_CD,'') OPN_BRN_CD_NM, --상품개설지점명 FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.MNGG_BRN_CD,'') MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM, --주거래부점명 '' AS AC_BAL, --계좌잔액 (SELECT DPRT_POST_NO FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.OPN_BRN_CD) AS OPN_BRN_CD_POST,--계좌개설지점우편번호 C.AC_OPN_DT, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.AC_OPN_DT,'') AS GDS_OPN_DT, --계좌개설일자 E.PRXY_NM, --대리인명 E.PRXY_RLTNS_CD, --대리인계좌주와의관계 E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, --대리인실명구분 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',E.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) as PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM, --대리인실명구분 FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO', (SELECT CS_NO FROM NIC01B Z WHERE Z.RNMCNO = E.PRXY_RNMCNO),'') AS PRXY_RNMCNO, --대리인실명번호 E.PRXY_CNTY_NATI_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_AREA_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_ECNO_CRYP||E.PRXY_CNTY_NO_CRYP AS PRXY_TEL_NO, --대리인전화번호 E.NTN_CD, --대리인국적 F.BRN_NM, --F.BRN_CD, F.TRNS_OGN_CD, --계좌개설금융기관코드 --C.AC_TY_CD, --계좌유형코드 '99' AS AC_TY_CD, NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.OPN_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS OPN_BRN_CD, --계좌개설지점코드 NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFB_DPRT_CD) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.MNGG_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD, --계좌관리점코드 F.BRN_NM, -- 조회점명 'ZZZZZZZ' AS BRN_CD, -- 조회점코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M059', NVL(TRIM(A.STR_JOB_GUBN),'91')) AS STR_JOB_GUBN, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') RP_DT, --조회일시, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-30, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:MM:SS') RP_DT_BE FROM NIC01B A, NIC17B C, NIC18B E, NIC86B F WHERE C.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND C.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND C.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO}

SELECT GNL_AC_NO||LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS GNL_SQ, --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001) ROWNUM AS DL_SQ, --거래순번 A.* FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) ORDERED */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM, --거래발생일시 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM, --거래종류명 GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM, --거래수단명 GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM,--거래채널명 A.CRNCY_CD, --통화구분코드 NVL(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, 0) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT, -- 외화거래금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','07','08','12','14','16','20') THEN A.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT, --입금금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09','13','15','21' ) THEN A.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT, --지급금액 A.TFND_RA, --잔액금액 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --취급금융기관명 DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM, -- 취급점명 GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM, --유가증권명 C.CHCK_STRT_NO, --시작번호 C.CHCK_END_NO, --끝번호 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) END AS CSH_BRN, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_NM, --의뢰인명 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM, --의뢰인실명구분 B.PRXY_RNMCNO, --의뢰인실명번호 B.NTN_CD, --의뢰인국적
-- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명 -- G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호 -- GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN '삼성증권' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.INSN_IDNF_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUS_INSTITUTION_CODE I WHERE I.INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KSDC' AND I.INSN_IDNF_CODE = T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(U.ACNT_NO), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_ACNT_NO_CRYP), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NM), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_SBTT_CLNT_NAME), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NO), ' ') ELSE ' ' END ELSE G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',S.RNM_CNFR_CCD) ELSE '기타' END ELSE SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
'' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD, --상대계좌주국적(데이터 없음) A.DL_TYP_CD, --거래종류코드 A.DL_WY_CD, --거래수단코드 A.DL_CHNNL_CD, --거래채널코드 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS OGN_CD, --취급금융기관코드 (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD, --취급점코드 C.CHCK_KND_CD, --유가증권코드 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW END AS CSH_ORG_CD, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) END AS CSH_BRN_CD, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, --의뢰인실명구분코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN 'GC0025' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.TRNSFRM_CD) FROM SSQ.NIC95B I WHERE I.CD = 'L189' AND I.CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE, 1, 6)), ' ') END ELSE (SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD='L188' AND CD_VL9 = G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD,--상대금융기관코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN S.RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE '99' END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE ' ' END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD, --상대계좌주실명구분코드
'A' AS GBN_CD, --정정구분코드 A.GNL_AC_NO, H.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, A.DTLS_TRDG_NAME AS A1, --적요(거래코드명) J.RPRS_ISCD AS A2, J.PRDT_NAME AS A3, A.DL_UPRC AS A4, TRUNC(A.DL_Q) AS A5, A.DL_AMT AS A6, CASE WHEN A.CHCK_AMT > 0 THEN A.CHCK_AMT END AS CHCK_AMT, --수표금액 A.ADJST_AMT, --정산금액 A.SECBAL_EVAL_AMT, --유가잔고 A.DPS_AMT, --예수금잔고 A.RCVBL_BAL_AMT, --미수금잔고 A.MLOAN_SLOAN_AMT --융자금/대주금 FROM SSQ.NIC61B A, SSQ.NIC99B B, SSQ.NIC63B C, SSQ.NIC01B D, SSQ.NIC04B E, SSQ.NIC86B F, SSQ.NIC62B G, SSQ.NIC17B H, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT J, SID.IDO_A_TLP_STCK_ISUS_BSC L,
SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T, SSQ.NIC17B U, SSQ.NIC01B S
WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND E.CNTC_TYP_CD(+) = '1' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = H.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = J.PRDT_ID(+) AND J.PRDT_ID = L.PRDT_ID(+)
AND A.DL_DT = T.TRDG_DATE(+) AND A.DL_SQ = T.TRDG_NO(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = T.ACNT_ID(+)
AND T.RLTV_ACNT_ID = U.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND U.RNMCNO = S.RNMCNO(+)
AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} ORDER BY A.DL_DT DESC, LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0') DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 500

SELECT ROWNUM , X.* FROM( SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT||'-'||T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',T3.DL_DT||T3.DL_TM,'') AS DL_DT_TM_VIEW , T5.DL_P_NM , T1.DL_P_RNMCNO , DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC40B WHERE BAS_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND RNMCNO=T1.DL_P_RNMCNO),0,'','Y') AS LGA_AST_YN , T1.RNM_PR_DL_SQ , GET_CODE_NAME('M062',T3.CTR_DL_KND_CD) AS CTR_DL_KND_CD_NM , CSH , CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','12') THEN T2.ACNT_NO ELSE '' END AS ACNT_NO , T2.GNL_AC_NO , CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('21','22') THEN NVL(T4.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, TRIM(T2.ACNT_NO)) ELSE '' END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO , FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',T3.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'') AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM --거래점 , CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','12') THEN FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',T2.MN_DL_DPRT_CD,'') END AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM --계좌관리점 , CASE WHEN CTR_DL_KND_CD IN ('11','12') THEN FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',T2.PRFT_BRN_CD,'') END AS PRFT_BRN_NM --계좌실적점 , V1.ACT_NAME , T1.OK_CCD , T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , T1.INST_ID , V1.PAR_INST_ID , V1.WORK_ID , V1.ACT_ID , T5.CS_NO , T5.INDV_CORP_CCD , DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC64B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT=T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID=T1.SSPS_DL_ID),0,'No','Yes') AS FILE_ATT_YN , CASE WHEN TRIM(T6.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL OR TRIM(T6.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END PRXY_YN , T7.CS_NO AS PRXY_CS_NO , CASE WHEN TRIM(T6.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD) IS NULL THEN '' ELSE (T6.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD|| ' / ' ||(SELECT CD_VL_NM FROM NIC95B WHERE CD='L058' AND TRNSFRM_CD = AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD)) END AS RLTNS_CD_NM , T1.STR_YN , GET_CODE_NAME('M045',T3.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM , T3.DTLS_TRDG_NAME , GET_CODE_NAME('M045',DECODE(T3.DL_TYP_CD,'01','02','02','01')) AS DL_TYP_NM_CPRTY , (SELECT SUM(CSH) FROM NIC61B_CTR WHERE RNMCNO = T1.DL_P_RNMCNO AND DL_DT = T3.DL_DT AND DL_TYP_CD = DECODE(T3.DL_TYP_CD,'01','02','02','01')) AS CSH_CPRTY FROM NIC66B T1, NIC71B T2, NIC75B T3, NIC83B T4, NIC70B T5, NIC98B T6, NIC01B T7, ( SELECT A.INST_ID, A.PAR_INST_ID , A.WORK_ID , A.ACT_NAME , A.ACT_ID , D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , D.SSPS_DL_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY A , NIC66B D WHERE ((A.PERSON_YN='Y') OR (A.PERSON_YN='N' AND A.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA, C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{dptRole} ) ) ) AND D.INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' AND A.INST_STATUS_CD != 'RETURNED' /*회수제외*/ ) V1 WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T2.SSPS_DL_ID AND T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T2.SSPS_DL_ID = T3.SSPS_DL_ID AND T2.GNL_AC_NO = T3.GNL_AC_NO AND T3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T3.SSPS_DL_ID = T4.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND T3.GNL_AC_NO = T4.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND T3.DL_DT = T4.DL_DT(+) AND T3.DL_SQ = T4.DL_SQ(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T5.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = T5.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = V1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = V1.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T6.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T6.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND T6.PRXY_RNMCNO = T7.RNMCNO(+)
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = T1.SSPS_DL_ID)
AND T3.DL_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND T2.ACNT_NO LIKE #{ACNT_NO} || '%'
AND T5.DL_P_NM LIKE '%'|| #{CS_NM} ||'%'
AND T5.CS_NO = #{CS_NO}
ORDER BY T3.DL_DT||T3.DL_TM DESC, T1.SSPS_DL_ID DESC ) X

SELECT A.CS_NM, --계좌주(사업자)명 A.RNM_CNFR_CCD, --실명번호구분코드 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --실명번호구분코드명 FN_CDINFO_VAR('NO',A.RNMCNO,'') AS RNMCNO, --고객번호 A.CS_NO, -- 실명번호 A.CS_NO AS CS_NO_DEC, -- 실명번호 C.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, A.NTN_CD, --국가코드 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --계좌개설금융기관 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW, FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC',C.GNL_AC_NO,'') as GNL_AC_NO, --계좌번호 C.GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO_ORI, NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD_EXPL FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = 'S050' AND CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(C.GNL_AC_NO, -2)),'기타') AS GOODS, (SELECT ACNT_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT_NAME WHERE ACNT_NAME_TYPE_CODE = 'TYPE' AND LANG_CODE = 'KO' AND ACNT_ID = C.GNL_AC_NO) AS ACNT_GDS_NM, --계좌상품명 C.AC_OPN_DT, --계좌개설일자 FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.OPN_BRN_CD,'') OPN_BRN_CD_NM, --상품개설지점명 FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',C.MNGG_BRN_CD,'') MN_DL_DPRT_CD_NM,--주거래부점명 NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.MNGG_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS MN_DL_DPRT_CD, '' AS AC_BAL, --계좌잔액 F.TRNS_OGN_CD, --계좌개설금융기관코드 NVL((SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM NIC95B WHERE CD = 'S050' AND CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(C.GNL_AC_NO, -2)),'99') AS AC_TY_CD, NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = C.OPN_BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS OPN_BRN_CD, --계좌개설지점코드 F.BRN_NM, -- 조회점명 NVL((SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = F.BRN_CD),'ZZZZZZZ') AS BRN_CD, -- 조회점코드 TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') RP_DT, --조회일시 DECODE(A.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',GET_CODE_NAME('M009' ,AML_JOB_GUBN),GET_CODE_NAME( 'M008',A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD)) OCPTN_CD -- 직업 FROM NIC01B A, NIC17B C, NIC86B F WHERE C.RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO AND C.ACNT_NO = #{ACNT_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT /* 혐의거래일 */ , T1.SSPS_DL_ID /* 혐의거래ID */ , CASE WHEN T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '수기 등록' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM /* 혐의명 */ , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME /* 결재단계 */ , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0')) ) AS OK_CCD_NM /* 보고구분 */ , T1.TRIG_CTNT /* 트리거 */ , T2.RPR_RSN_CNTNT /* 보고/제외 의견 */ , T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT , 'Y' AS DL_P_YN , '' AS RL_P_YN FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC67B T2 , (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID ) D WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T2.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} UNION ALL SELECT T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT /* 혐의거래일 */ , T1.SSPS_DL_ID /* 혐의거래ID */ , CASE WHEN T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '수기 등록' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM /* 혐의명 */ , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME /* 결재단계 */ , GET_CODE_NAME('A301', (NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0')) ) AS OK_CCD_NM /* 보고구분 */ , T1.TRIG_CTNT /* 트리거 */ , T2.RPR_RSN_CNTNT /* 보고/제외 의견 */ , T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT , '' AS DL_P_YN , 'Y' AS RL_P_YN FROM NIC66B T1 , NIC67B T2 , NIC71B T3 , (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID ) D WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T2.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T2.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T3.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T3.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO != T3.RNMCNO AND T3.RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}

SELECT GNL_AC_NO||LPAD(ROWNUM,5,'0') AS GNL_SQ, --거래일련번호(계좌번호 + 순번 ex) 11100001123456 + 000001) ROWNUM AS DL_SQ, --거래순번 A.* FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(A) ORDERED */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DL_DT || LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DL_DT_TM, --거래발생일시 GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_NM, --거래종류명 GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM, --거래수단명 GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM,--거래채널명 A.CRNCY_CD, --통화구분코드 NVL(A.FCRNCY_DL_AMT, 0) AS FCRNCY_DL_AMT, -- 외화거래금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('01','04','07','08','12','14','16','20') THEN A.DL_AMT END AS IN_AMT, --입금금액 CASE WHEN A.DL_TYP_CD IN ('02','05','09','13','15','21' ) THEN A.DL_AMT END AS OUT_AMT, --지급금액 A.TFND_RA, --잔액금액 F.RPR_OGN_NM, --취급금융기관명 DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) AS HANDLNG_BRN_NM, -- 취급점명 GET_CODE_NAME('M052', C.CHCK_KND_CD) AS CHCK_KND_NM, --유가증권명 C.CHCK_STRT_NO, --시작번호 C.CHCK_END_NO, --끝번호 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.RPR_OGN_NM END AS CSH_ORG, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN DECODE(FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,''),'','',FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD,'')) END AS CSH_BRN, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_NM, --의뢰인명 GET_CODE_NAME('M002',B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD_NM, --의뢰인실명구분 B.PRXY_RNMCNO, --의뢰인실명번호 B.NTN_CD, --의뢰인국적
-- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호 -- CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL -- AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명 -- G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호 -- GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN '삼성증권' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.INSN_IDNF_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUS_INSTITUTION_CODE I WHERE I.INSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KSDC' AND I.INSN_IDNF_CODE = T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, --상대금융기관명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(U.ACNT_NO), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_ACNT_NO_CRYP), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, --상대계좌번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NM), ' ') ELSE NVL(TRIM(T.OTCP_SBTT_CLNT_NAME), ' ') END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, --상대계좌주명
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN NVL(TRIM(S.CS_NO), ' ') ELSE ' ' END ELSE G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO, --상대계좌주실명번호
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',S.RNM_CNFR_CCD) ELSE '기타' END ELSE SSQ.GET_CODE_NAME('M002',G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD_NM, --상대계좌주실명구분
'' AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD, --상대계좌주국적(데이터 없음) A.DL_TYP_CD, --거래종류코드 A.DL_WY_CD, --거래수단코드 A.DL_CHNNL_CD, --거래채널코드 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW AS OGN_CD, --취급금융기관코드 (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) AS HANDLNG_BRN_CD, --취급점코드 C.CHCK_KND_CD, --유가증권코드 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW END AS CSH_ORG_CD, --현금지급금융기관명 CASE WHEN A.DL_WY_CD = '01' AND A.CHCK_AMT = 0 THEN (SELECT TRIM(KFTC_BRHN_CODE) FROM SSQ.NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = A.HANDLNG_BRN_CD) END AS CSH_BRN_CD, --현금지급영업점명 B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD, --의뢰인실명구분코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN 'GC0025' ELSE NVL((SELECT TRIM(I.TRNSFRM_CD) FROM SSQ.NIC95B I WHERE I.CD = 'L189' AND I.CD_VL9 = SUBSTR(T.KSD_DPSD_INSN_CODE, 1, 6)), ' ') END ELSE (SELECT TRNSFRM_CD FROM SSQ.NIC95B WHERE CD='L188' AND CD_VL9 = G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD) END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD,--상대금융기관코드
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.TRDG_CODE, 1, 1) IN ('5', '6') THEN CASE WHEN NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) > 0 AND NVL(T.ACNT_ID, 0) != NVL(T.RLTV_ACNT_ID, 0) THEN S.RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE '99' END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM) IS NOT NULL THEN G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ELSE ' ' END END AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD, --상대계좌주실명구분코드
'A' AS GBN_CD, --정정구분코드 A.GNL_AC_NO, H.ACNT_NO AS ACNT_NO_DEC, A.DTLS_TRDG_NAME AS A1, --적요(거래코드명) J.RPRS_ISCD AS A2, J.PRDT_NAME AS A3, A.DL_UPRC AS A4, TRUNC(A.DL_Q) AS A5, A.DL_AMT AS A6, CASE WHEN A.CHCK_AMT > 0 THEN A.CHCK_AMT END AS CHCK_AMT, --수표금액 A.ADJST_AMT, --정산금액 A.SECBAL_EVAL_AMT, --유가잔고 A.DPS_AMT, --예수금잔고 A.RCVBL_BAL_AMT, --미수금잔고 A.MLOAN_SLOAN_AMT, --융자금/대주금 F.TRNS_OGN_CD_NEW, --취급금융기관코드 CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NIC75B AA, NIC66B BB WHERE AA.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = BB.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND AA.SSPS_DL_ID = BB.SSPS_DL_ID AND AA.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND AA.DL_DT = A.DL_DT AND AA.DL_SQ = A.DL_SQ AND BB.SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' AND BB.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DOBT_DL_RPR_YN, --의심거래보고여부 (SELECT DECODE(TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME), '거래소', '코스피', TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME)) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '00828' AND T.CMN_CDVL = L.BYMK_SECT_CODE AND T.DEL_YN <> 'Y') AS BYMK_SECT_NM --거래소명 FROM SSQ.NIC61B A, SSQ.NIC99B B, SSQ.NIC63B C, SSQ.NIC01B D, SSQ.NIC04B E, SSQ.NIC86B F, SSQ.NIC62B G, SSQ.NIC17B H, SID.IDO_A_UUP_PRODUCT J, SID.IDO_A_TLP_STCK_ISUS_BSC L,
SID.IDO_A_MBA_TRDG T, SSQ.NIC17B U, SSQ.NIC01B S
WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ(+) AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO(+) AND E.CNTC_TYP_CD(+) = '1' AND A.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND A.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = H.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND A.ISUS_PRDT_ID = J.PRDT_ID(+) AND J.PRDT_ID = L.PRDT_ID(+)
AND A.DL_DT = T.TRDG_DATE(+) AND A.DL_SQ = T.TRDG_NO(+) AND A.GNL_AC_NO = T.ACNT_ID(+)
AND T.RLTV_ACNT_ID = U.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND U.RNMCNO = S.RNMCNO(+)
AND A.GNL_AC_NO = #{GNL_AC_NO} AND A.DL_DT BETWEEN #{FROMDATE} AND #{TODATE} ORDER BY A.DL_DT DESC, LPAD(TRIM(A.DL_TM),6,'0') DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 500

SELECT B.*, ( SELECT CS_NM FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = B.RNMCNO )AS CS_NM, DECODE(NVL(TRIM(B.CLSD_DT),''),'','N','Y') AS CLSD_YN FROM NIC17B B WHERE 1 = 1
AND B.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC01B WHERE CS_NO= #{CS_NO})
AND B.RNMCNO = (SELECT RNMCNO FROM NIC17B WHERE TRIM(ACNT_NO) = #{ACNT_NO} AND ROWNUM = 1)
ORDER BY B.ACNT_NO

SELECT DISTINCT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID_F , CASE WHEN T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '수기 등록' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE GET_CODE_NAME('A029',T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD) END AS ACT_NAME , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NULL OR T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT FROM NIC66B T1 , (SELECT A.INST_ID, C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID) D WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID AND T1.OK_CCD = '0' AND T1.SSPS_TYP_CD NOT IN (SELECT C.MA01_6 FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B WHERE B.PKG_ID = '6' AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID='6318' AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y') AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT},'YYYYMMDD'),-1),'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT},'YYYYMMDD'), 1),'YYYYMMDD') AND (T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT != #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} OR T1.SSPS_DL_ID != #{SSPS_DL_ID}) UNION SELECT DISTINCT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID_F , CASE WHEN T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '수기 등록' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(T1.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM , V1.ACT_NAME , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , CASE WHEN T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NULL OR T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT='' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT FROM NIC66B T1 , ( SELECT A.ACT_NAME , D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , D.SSPS_DL_ID FROM V_WF_STANDBY A , NIC66B D WHERE ((A.PERSON_YN='Y' AND A.PARTICIPANT_ID = #{USER_ID}) OR (A.PERSON_YN='N' AND A.PARTICIPANT_ID IN (SELECT BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE AA, C_USER BB WHERE AA.USER_ID= #{USER_ID} AND AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.DEP_ID || '.' || ROLE_ID = #{DPT_ROLE} ) ) ) AND D.M_INST_ID = A.PAR_INST_ID AND D.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND D.XCL_RSN_CNTNT LIKE '병합처리%' ) V1 WHERE T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = V1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = V1.SSPS_DL_ID AND T1.OK_CCD = '2' AND T1.SSPS_TYP_CD NOT IN (SELECT C.MA01_6 FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B WHERE B.PKG_ID = '6' AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID='6318' AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y') AND T1.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{DL_P_RNMCNO} AND T1.M_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND T1.M_SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY SSPS_DL_ID_F
